Kidplokio Sonic Space Blaster Toy Gun with Flashing Lights and Sounds, Blue,

Defenders of our solar system and unknown galaxies beyond, your little one is busy fighting evil galactic villains and rogue galaxy agents—after dinner and homework of course! And so, to keep their pretend play sessions running at top speed, they’ll need the Kidplokio Sonic Space Blaster Toy Gun with flashing, colorful lights and fast-paced blasting sound effects to ensure victory and a safe journey home.

And, let’s not forget about the fast-action trigger (this is where the action happens!); upon release of the trigger, the space soldier toy gun sets off an awesome display of colorful, flashing lights in conjunction with wild blasting firing sounds, that makes saving the galaxy even more fun! The toy gun comes WITH batteries, so superhero action can start right out of the box! No screwdrivers, batteries or other tools are required.

Key Features

  • SONIC SPACE BLASTER TOY GUN: As defenders of our solar system and unknown galaxies beyond, kids will need the Kidplokio Sonic Space Blaster Toy Gun to keep pretend play space missions running at top speed! Featuring flashing colorful lights and awesome blasting sound effects, aliens and evil galactic villains won’t stand a chance!
  • FAST ACTION TOY GUN TRIGGER: This is where the action happens! Upon the release of the trigger, the Kidplokio interactive toy gun explodes with bright lights and wild blasting sounds for the ultimate in intergalactic fighting fun!
  • INTERGALACTIC PRETEND PLAY: A great toy to get kids off the couch and reduce screen time from cell phones and computers, the sonic blaster toy gun is action packed, boasting some seriously cool pretend play fighting features that will have kids up on their feet in search of the next alien invasion or cross galaxy mission
  • NO TOY GUN ASSEMBLY NEEDED: The sonic space blaster toy gun comes assembled with batteries included, so the superhero action can start right out of the box! No screwdrivers, batteries or other tools are required to get this toy gun going
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 10 x 6 x 1.5 inches; Weight: 0.75lbs; Colors: Blue or Green; Warning: Choking Hazard, small parts; Batteries Included; Ages: 3+

Product Specifications

  • Color: Blue
  • Size: 9 in

A great toy to get your kids off the couch and reduce screen time away from cell phones and computers, the toy gun is action packed, boasting some seriously cool pretend play fighting features that will have kids up on their feet in search of the next intergalactic battle. Whether it’s an alien invasion or a space mission to a galaxy far, far away, kids will have a blast indoors or outside with this super fun Kidplokio Space Blaster Galaxy Toy Gun. Made from durable plastic construction to withstand hours of pretend play, the toy gun space soldier galaxy blaster is lightweight and easy for kids to operate.
